title: Having syntax crashes server
poc: select * from t where i= (select max(i) from t);
select * from t having i= max(i);
key_bug_features: using HAVING clause with aggregate function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INT, value FLOAT, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES(3, NULL, 'C', NULL);
SELECT name FROM test_table HAVING value = MAX(value);
